args.name: path
args.description: Absolute path to resolve files & entry points from. This just changes the process' cwd

args.name: path
args.description: Config file to load Bun from (e.g. -c bunfig.toml)

args.name: order
args.description: Defaults to: .tsx,.ts,.jsx,.js,.json

options.description: Changes the function called when compiling JSX elements using the classic JSX runtime
Changes the function called when compiling JSX fragments
Declares the module specifier to be used for importing the jsx and jsxs factory functions. Default: "react"

args.name: args
args.description: Import a module before other modules are loaded

args.name: args
args.description: Main fields to lookup in package.json. Defaults to --target dependent

options.description: Print version with revision and exit

args.name: overrides
args.description: Load tsconfig from path instead of cwd/tsconfig.json

args.name: k=v
args.description: Substitute key=value while parsing, e.g. --define process.env.NODE_ENV=development

args.name: args
args.description: Exclude module from transpilation (can use * wildcards). ex: -e react

args.name: args
args.description: Parse files with .ext:loader, e.g. --loader .js:jsx. Valid loaders: js, jsx, ts, tsx, json, toml, text, file, wasm, napi

args.name: args
args.description: Rewrite import URLs to start with --origin. Default: ""

args.name: args
args.description: Port to serve Bun's dev server on. Default: "3000"

args.name: arg

options.description: Skip staleness checks for packages in the Bun runtime and resolve from disk
Use the latest matching versions of packages in the Bun runtime, always checking npm
Don't repeat the command for bun run
Generate a standalone Bun executable containing your bundled code
Specifies the module format to build to. Only esm is supported currently
Root directory used for multiple entry points
A prefix to be appended to any import paths in bundled code
Customize entry point filenames. Defaults to "[dir]/[name].[ext]"
Transpile file only, do not bundle
Dump environment variables from .env and process as JSON and quit. Useful for debugging
Dump system limits. Useful for debugging

options.description: Skip staleness checks for packages in the Bun runtime and resolve from disk
Use the latest matching versions of packages in the Bun runtime, always checking npm
Don't repeat the command for bun run
Set the per-test timeout in milliseconds, default is 5000
Re-run each test file <NUMBER> times, helps catch certain bugs
Only run tests that are marked with "test.only()"
Include tests that are marked with "test.todo()"
Exit the test suite after <NUMBER> failures. If you do not specify a number, it defaults to 1
Run only tests with a name that matches the given regex
Dump environment variables from .env and process as JSON and quit. Useful for debugging
Dump system limits. Useful for debugging

args.name: files
args.description: Test files to run

script: find $(npm prefix) | grep -E ".*.(test|_test|spec|_spec).(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$" | grep -vE ".*/node_modules/.*" | sed "s|$(npm prefix)/||"
